title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 166.517 - Assets used for program purposes only
text:
166.517.  Assets used for program purposes only. — The assets of the deposit program shall at all times be preserved, invested, and expended only for the purposes set forth in this section and in accordance with the participation agreements, and no property rights therein shall exist in favor of the state.
(L. 2004 H.B. 959 § 166.540)
